executive_summary.finding: EGLD price ripped +14.74% to $4.67, decoupling from BTC (+2.71%). Z-score +3.40σ, second elevation in 4 weeks. Two-week cumulative +25.9% approaches regime-shift threshold.

First major unstaking event since tracking began: -325K EGLD from staking module (-2.20%). Staked ratio reversed 49.50% → 48.33%, derailing the run-#6 forecast of 50% milestone breach. The capital landed in Binance Staking wallet (+377K) — sitting in custody, not yet distributed.

DEX volume EXPLODED +338% to $328K (z=+5.86σ — CRITICAL anomaly, largest in tracked history). WEGLD/USDC alone captured 91% of pair volume — CEX-derived buyers parking in USDC during the price action.

Cross-exchange OTC pipeline CONFIRMED. Found 8 new routing wallets: UPbit OTC + OTC Distribution Wallet forward 1-2K EGLD chunks to Bybit, Binance, KuCoin within minutes. Reverse leg also exists: Bybit → KuCoin via erd1rffkz8zwp3. Multi-hop cross-exchange settlement layer is now operational on MultiversX.

Yield-chase migration continued for 2nd week: Egld Staking Provider +17K, Ninja Staking +3K (both 0% fee, 9%+ APR). Top 4 losers were 7-8% APR providers with 9.9-12% fees. The asymmetric value zone is actively pulling capital.

Token holder count declined again across all top-15 tokens — 7th consecutive week. Pattern is structural airdrop decay, not real adoption loss (active >$1M-mcap tokens remain stable). Now established as a baseline behavior, no longer surprising.

Binance hot wallet rotation: erd1ylwu -350K, erd1sdsl +295K — internal rebalancing. Binance entity net +329K (driven entirely by Staking wallet absorbing unstaked EGLD). No directional pressure on price from Binance hot wallets.
Unknown Whale erd17l22 gained +58,641 EGLD (+22.6%) in one week — largest non-exchange whale balance increase. Now 318K EGLD. Investigation candidate.

network_health.analysis: Network had its strongest WoW divergence between price (+14.74%) and on-chain staking (-2.20%) since tracking began. The price rally is structural: EGLD outperformed BTC by 12 percentage points (+14.74% vs +2.71%). But staked EGLD dropped for the first time — 325K unstaked into the Binance Staking wallet. Combined with the +5.86σ DEX volume anomaly (mostly WEGLD/USDC trading), the picture is "rally-driven liquidity demand": holders unstaking to capture price gains, with subsequent on-chain trading concentrated in stablecoin pairs. APR rose mechanically (+0.20pp to 8.79%) because the same reward pool is now distributed across less stake. Account growth slowed (+2,980 vs +5K typical) and transaction count +1.37M is in line. The 50% staked-ratio approach is now postponed indefinitely.

wallet_changes.label: OTC Distribution Wallet (coordinated with UPbit OTC Desk)

exchange_flows.signal: mixed — Binance custody-side accumulating, exchange hot wallets net negative

entity_netting.interpretation: Net +329K driven by Binance Staking wallet +377K (absorbing unstaked EGLD from direct node staking). Hot-wallet rotation: erd1ylwu -350K + erd1sdsl +295K = -55K hot. Custody-side accumulation, distribution-side neutral.
-29K. Shrinking despite receiving large multi-hop OTC flows on May 11 — net customer withdrawal dominates.
-21K (-40.7%). Reversal after 2 growth weeks — back to declining trajectory.
-15K (-33.7%). Significant outflow; received routing-wallet flows but net negative.
-14K. Despite +78K last week, this week is mild outflow. OTC desks still active — UPbit OTC Desk grew +10K and OTC Distribution Wallet +11K.
+16K. Quiet week; no large OTC events.

whale_intelligence.analysis: Three big themes. (1) The first major unstaking event in 6+ weeks: 325K EGLD left the staking module and 377K appeared in Binance Staking wallet — Binance-attributed unstaking of ~377K (the difference is normal noise). The capital is parked, not distributed. Watch next week: if it moves to Binance hot wallets, that's a major sell signal; if it gets re-delegated to other providers, that's a customer rotation; if it stays parked, it's an open option. (2) Cross-exchange OTC pipeline now confirmed at scale: 8 newly-discovered routing wallets channeling identical-amount chunks (1-2K EGLD) from UPbit's OTC infrastructure to Bybit/Binance/KuCoin, plus reverse Bybit→KuCoin via erd1rffkz8zwp3. This is a multi-hop cross-exchange settlement layer — the routing wallets all have near-zero balance, high nonces, and forward funds within minutes. (3) Mid-whale tier expanded +333K while large-whale tier was flat — capital is broadening to mid-sized holders. Combined with the 21 new mid-whales now in scope (vs. fewer previously), this is wealth-broadening into the 10-100K range. Unknown Whale erd17l22 took +58K, the largest non-exchange single-wallet gain. Funding source unclear — top investigation priority next run.

staking_intelligence.analysis: Delegated stake (via /providers) +120K EGLD to 11.29M, but total staked (via /economics including direct node staking) DROPPED -325K to 14.45M. The 445K gap is the direct-node unstaking captured by Binance Staking wallet (+377K matches the size). Concentration unchanged: HHI 0.01869 (vs 0.01868 prev), top-5 19.78%, top-10 30.48%. No validator joiners or leavers. Within the delegation market, the yield-chase signal is now well-established: Egld Staking Provider (+17K, 9.28% APR, 0% fee), Primal Block One (+16K), Core Block (+12K), Project X (+11K), Ninja Staking (+3K). Top losers all had 7-12% fees + 7-9% APRs: ProCrypto (-15K), Valuestaking (-15K), Orius (-11K), cslabsio (-9K). Delegators NET -10 (flat) — capital is rotating to high-yield/zero-fee providers without bringing new participants. The "asymmetric value zone" (top APR + lowest fee intersection) is now: mapleleafnetwork, egldstakingprovider, ninjastaking, star_staking — all 9.1-9.28% APR at 0% fee. Combined locked: 722K EGLD (6.4% of delegated).

token_activity.analysis: DEX volume exploded to $328K (+338%), the largest single-week reading since tracking began (z=+5.86σ). But the structure is unbalanced: WEGLD/USDC alone is 91% of pair volume — buyers parking in USDC during the EGLD rally. MEX/WEGLD ($9.4K) and ZoidPay/WEGLD ($8.9K) trail far behind. Token holder counts declined across all top-15 tokens for the 7th consecutive week — this is now confirmed airdrop wallet decay, not a real adoption metric. Real adoption tokens (active >$1M mcap) include WEGLD ($2.5M), MEX ($1.7M), HTM ($1.4M), USH ($686K), WTAO ($1.8M). ZoidPay diverged sharply from the EGLD rally: -12% WoW (last week was +33%, suggesting prior pump-and-dump). EmoryaSportsX still anomalous at $21.9M mcap with 10K holders — likely synthetic price feed, no liquid market.

protocol_breakdown.notable_events: Sum across HUSDC/HUSDT/HEGLD/HWBTC/HWETH/HHTM/HMEX/HUTK/HWTAO/HBUSD; excludes HSEGLD/HSWTAO to avoid LSD double-count

defi_activity.analysis: TOTAL TRACKED DEFI TVL: $14,043,364. Hatom remains the dominant DeFi anchor with combined TVL = $9,819,519 (Lending $4.64M, LSD $4.49M, USH $0.69M). Hatom Liquid Staking GREW (SEGLD $4.49M, +5%-ish in EGLD terms). Hatom Lending appears mostly flat in USD terms (~$5.31M) despite the 14.7% EGLD price increase — meaning underlying deposit base SHRANK in EGLD terms by ~13%. This is the second consecutive observation of lending TVL not keeping pace with price — depositors are withdrawing during the rally to capture price gains. XOXNO LSD ($1.71M) gained from EGLD price appreciation. XOXNO Aggregator throughput SPIKED to 16,784 daily transfers (+37.8% WoW) — the highest single-contract throughput on the network. JEXchange Lite Pool also spiked to 3,306/day (+48% WoW). xExchange Router 787/day — modest. The DEX activity is splintering across aggregators and orderbook venues, not just AMM pairs.

anomalies.description: DEX 24h volume $328,098 is +5.86σ above baseline mean $101,046. This is the largest single-week DEX volume in tracked history — 4.4x the previous-week reading. Confirms the EGLD price rally is now spilling into on-chain DEX trading, not just CEX.

EGLD price $4.67 is +3.40σ above 6-week mean. EGLD outperformed BTC by 12pp this week (+14.7% vs +2.7%). The April +3.29σ spike reverted to +0.77σ last week; this is now a second elevation, suggesting the rally is structural rather than a one-week event.
Net unstaking of ~325K EGLD this week; Binance Staking wallet absorbed +377K (the unstaked capital sits in Binance custody now, awaiting deployment or distribution).

accelerating_exchange_outflows.interpretation: After +18.4% (run #3) and stable subsequent weeks, KuCoin dropped 33.7% in a single week. Routed flows visible: KuCoin → Bybit via erd14n5vtgezss routing wallet.

accelerating_exchange_outflows.trend: Reversal back to decline after 2 growth weeks
accelerating_exchange_outflows.interpretation: -40.7% this week breaks the recent +33.7%/+9.5% growth streak — the run #4 customer-exit pattern is back.

token_supply_events.name: EGLD
token_supply_events.description: +47,893 EGLD minted via block rewards (normal inflation)

consecutive_streaks.interpretation: Every major token (top 15 by holders) declined for the 7th consecutive week. Pattern is now well-established as airdrop wallet decay — active token base (>$1M mcap) is stable.

EGLD up 2 consecutive weeks: +5.4% (Apr 27→May 4) then +14.7% (May 4→May 11). Cumulative +25.9% from $3.71 baseline. Approaches regime-shift threshold; one more week of upside would promote to regime shift.
BROKEN this week. After 6 consecutive weeks of expansion (14.25M → 14.78M, +3.7%), staked EGLD dropped -2.20% (-325K). Trend reversal — first negative week since tracking began.

regime_shifts.description: Confirmed: UPbit OTC Desk + OTC Distribution Wallet are now actively forwarding identical-amount chunks (1.0-2.0K EGLD each) to 8 newly-discovered routing wallets that distribute to Bybit (most frequent destination), Binance, and KuCoin within minutes. Plus reverse: Bybit → KuCoin via erd1rffkz8zwp3 routing. Multi-hop cross-exchange settlement layer is now operational.

DEX volume jumped 338% to $328K — z=+5.86σ. Whether this is a single-event spike or a regime shift depends on next week. WEGLD/USDC alone is 91% of pair volume — concentration on USDC during the price action suggests CEX-derived buyers parking in stablecoin pairs.

api_quirks: Provider list sort by /providers?size=200 returns 185 entries (108 with locked>0) — many idle providers with zero stake exist. Filter by locked>0 for meaningful concentration analysis.
identity field in /providers payload is the stable matching key across runs (the provider address field changes); previous runs already documented this — re-validated.

methodology_changes: CONFIRMED: Cross-exchange OTC funnel pattern (run #6 hypothesis) — 8 routing wallets traced, multi-hop pipeline (UPbit → routers → Bybit/Binance/KuCoin) operational.
ADDED: Bybit→KuCoin reverse-direction routing pattern via erd1rffkz8zwp3 — the cross-exchange settlement layer is bidirectional, not just unidirectional OTC distribution.
CONFIRMED: Yield-chase migration is now a sustained 2-week trend, approaches regime-shift threshold next week.
OBSERVATION: When EGLD price ripping, lending TVL stays flat in USD terms — depositors withdraw to capture gains. Worth tracking as a regular signal.
meta_learning.most_valuable_insight: Cross-exchange OTC pipeline validation — 8 routing wallets confirm the run-#6 hypothesis that the OTC infrastructure on MultiversX is a multi-exchange settlement layer, not exchange-internal flow. The bidirectional Bybit↔KuCoin leg is new and suggests the routing fabric is general-purpose CEX-to-CEX settlement, not just OTC distribution.
meta_learning.top_recommendation: Build an OTC-flow tracker: enumerate all routing wallets seen forwarding identical-amount chunks within <5min between known exchange/OTC addresses. Compute weekly OTC throughput per exchange-pair edge (UPbit-OTC→Bybit, OTC-Dist→Binance, Bybit↔KuCoin). This becomes a first-class metric of cross-exchange settlement volume and might predict directional pressure.
recommendations_for_next_run: Build an OTC-flow tracker: enumerate all routing wallets forwarding identical-amount chunks within 5min between known exchange/OTC addresses. Compute throughput per exchange-pair edge. Promote to canonical metric if pattern persists.
Track the 325K unstaked EGLD: if Binance Staking wallet drops next week, the capital moved out. If it stays at 3.10M, it's parked (open option). If it grows, more unstaking incoming.
Investigate Unknown Whale erd17l22xekj5l (+58K, now 318K EGLD): query its inbound transactions in the last 14 days to find funding source. Largest unexplained non-exchange gain.
Verify yield-chase regime shift: if Egld Staking Provider gains another 10K+ and the lowest-APR/highest-fee providers continue losing, promote to regime shift.
Test the DEX volume regime: if $200K+ sustains next week, this is a regime shift not a one-week anomaly.
Add the 8 new routing wallets to known-addresses.json under exchange_routers section with metadata (origin → destination, nonce, balance pattern).
Hatom Lending TVL did NOT keep pace with the price rally — query H-token supplies (in token units, not USD) WoW to confirm depositor withdrawals.
XOXNO Aggregator throughput +37.8% WoW — is this driven by the rally or a real product event? Query xoxno_agg deployer/recent SC ABI for new feature.
Newly-issued token detection still degraded — try /accounts/erd1qqqq...ESDT-contract/transactions with function=issue filter as an alternative discovery path.
MEX z-score baseline now N=3 (need N=4 for z-score). One more week.
Total delegators baseline N=3 now (179038 → 179060 → 179050). Baseline stable. Z-score-eligible from run #8.
